ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields legible. ICC certificate with stamps and QR verification code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Contains header branding 'Th.BRUNIUS paper and board around the world'.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: The invoice contains 'LC no:LC0957625005730' and 'PAYMENT TERMS: Irrevocable LC At Sight'. However, the CERTIFICATE does not contain any LC reference. The LC-undantag (avsnitt 2.2) requires that the CERTIFICATE contains an explicit LC reference with a concrete number. The certificate has no field labeled 'L/C No.', 'LC Number', 'Letter of Credit' or similar. The certificate number is 'SEG-26D-463104' which does not contain 'LC' as a banking term. Therefore, the LC exception is NOT activated. Verification proceeds according to all checkpoints in section 4.

search_results.text_found: Th.BRUNIUS paper and board around the world

criteria_met: Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' identified as invoice issuer 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' — criterion 2 met.
Consignee 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' identified in 'SOLD TO' and 'CONSIGNED TO' fields — criterion 3 met.
pairing_validation.reasoning: At least two of the three pairing criteria are met. Document pair is valid.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Th. Brunius & Co AB, Po Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice files/pages.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' was found in the invoice in multiple locations: (1) header/branding 'Th.BRUNIUS', (2) issuer address block 'Th. Brunius & Co AB', (3) certification footer 'Th.Brunius & Co AB'. The name is identical after normalization of spacing (Th.Brunius vs Th. Brunius). Rule 4.1.0 is satisfied — no need to proceed to 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country match between certificate and invoice for consignor.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: Sweden. Invoice issuer address: Sweden. VAT prefix SE also confirms Sweden. Exact country match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Group structure — consignor name found expressly in invoice

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'Th. Brunius & Co AB, Po Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden'. The only difference in the company name is the space after 'Th.' (certificate has 'Th.Brunius' while invoice has 'Th. Brunius'). This is a minor spacing variation — allowed under basic normalization (extra mellanslag). Country Sweden matches explicitly. VAT NO SE556011055201 confirms Sweden via SE prefix (rule 4.1.2.1). MATCH via rule 4.1.0.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd, Unit B,24/F,C and D International Building, No.1699,Huandao East Road, Siming District, Xiamen, China
checkpoints.invoice_value: Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd, Unit B, 24/F, C&D International Building., No.1699, Huandao East Road, Siming District Xiamen, China

comparison_steps.description: Identify consignee in invoice using priority order: primary billing fields first.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has 'SOLD TO' field with 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' — this is a primary billing field. Also has 'CONSIGNED TO' field with the same company. Certificate consignee matches both.

comparison_steps.description: Verify company name match after normalization.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd'. Names are identical. Minor formatting differences in address ('C and D' vs 'C&D') are covered by & ↔ AND normalization. 'Building' vs 'Building.' is punctuation normalization.
Certificate: China. Invoice SOLD TO: China. Exact match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority identification — SOLD TO is primary billing field

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' in China. Invoice SOLD TO: 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' in China. Company names are identical. 'C and D International Building' (certificate) vs 'C&D International Building.' (invoice) — '&' ↔ 'and' normalization and trailing period are allowed. Country China matches exactly. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Saica Testliner 90gsm; Total Unit Count: 27 Reels

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and verify in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'Saica Testliner 90gsm'. Invoice DESCRIPTION: 'Saica Testliner 90gsm'. Exact text match after normalization. Additionally, '27 reels' in certificate matches 'Total Unit Count: 27 Reels' in invoice. 'Commodity: Saica Testliner 90gsm' also confirms in order details section.

rules_applied.rule_description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation identified and matched
Non-identity-bearing additions (27 reels / Total Unit Count: 27 Reels) do not affect match

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: '27 reels of Saica Testliner 90gsm'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Saica Testliner 90gsm'. Invoice DESCRIPTION field: 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' — exact match. The quantity '27 reels' in the certificate corresponds to 'Total Unit Count: 27 Reels' in the invoice. Also confirmed by 'Commodity: Saica Testliner 90gsm' in the order details. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that the numeric value and unit from the certificate can be identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7: '49.770 mt gross/net'. This is the verification-grounding quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Invoice states: 'Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT'. Numeric value 49.770 matches exactly. Unit MT matches exactly. The certificate states 'gross/net' meaning the weight is the same for both gross and net — this is common for products shipped without significant packaging weight. The invoice does not distinguish GW/NW either, stating just 'Total Weight Quantity'. No contradictory weight value exists in the invoice.

Certificate states 'gross/net' indicating the weight is the same for both categories. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT' without specifying GW or NW separately. Since the certificate indicates gross equals net, and the invoice provides a single weight value that matches, there is no contradiction. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: one weight value in certificate, one matching value in invoice, no contradictory alternative → MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Direct identification — numeric value 49.770 and unit MT found in invoice
Weight category — gross/net same value, single invoice weight, no contradiction

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '49.770 mt gross/net'. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT'. The numeric value 49.770 is an exact match. The unit MT matches exactly. The certificate indicates that gross weight equals net weight (gross/net). The invoice provides a single total weight of 49.770 MT without further GW/NW breakdown — no contradictory alternative weight value exists. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, this is a single-value scenario with matching value and no contradiction → MATCH. No tolerance calculation needed as values are identical.

comparison_steps.description: Identify country of origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: FRANCE'. This is a dedicated origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin after normalization.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'France'. Invoice: 'FRANCE'. After case normalization: 'france' = 'france'. Exact match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Origin identified in explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field
Case normalization — France / FRANCE are identical

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'France'. Invoice has explicit dedicated field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: FRANCE'. After case normalization both are 'france'. Note: France is an EU member state, and the certificate header is 'EUROPEAN UNION', but since the certificate specifically names 'France' in box 3 and the invoice specifically names 'FRANCE' in the Country of Origin field, this is a direct exact match. No EU-normalization needed. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Not needed — direct country name match 'France' = 'FRANCE'. EU-normalization is only required when the naming differs between EU/specific country.

rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate does not contain an LC reference. The invoice mentions 'LC no:LC0957625005730' and 'Irrevocable LC At Sight', but per rule 2.2, the LC exception requires the CERTIFICATE to contain the LC reference. LC exception not activated.
Document A (Certificate of Origin) is the certificate file. Document B (Commercial Invoice) is the invoice file. One certificate, one invoice. Clear pairing.
Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' identified as invoice issuer. Consignee 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' identified in SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO. Multiple criteria met.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Group structure — consignor found in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' found in invoice issuer block as 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' (spacing difference only), also in branding header and certification footer.
Sweden = Sweden. Also confirmed by VAT prefix SE.
SOLD TO field identified as primary billing field. Company name matches certificate consignee exactly.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' identified in both certificate and invoice with exact match.
49.770 MT in certificate matches 49.770 MT in invoice exactly.
Certificate states gross/net (same value). Invoice provides single total weight. No contradictory alternative weight. Point 2 applies → MATCH.
Explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: FRANCE' field in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Th.Brunius & Co AB i Sverige återfinns tydligt i fakturan. Mottagaren Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd i Kina matchar fakturans köpare. Varubeskrivningen 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' och vikten 49.770 MT samt ursprungslandet Frankrike överensstämmer exakt mellan certifikatet och fakturan.
overall_assessment.decision_reasoning: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH: (1) Consignor Th.Brunius & Co AB identified as invoice issuer with matching country Sweden; (2) Consignee Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd found in SOLD TO and CONSIGNED TO fields with matching country China; (3) Goods description 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' exactly matches invoice description; (4) Quantity 49.770 MT gross/net exactly matches invoice Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT; (5) Country of Origin France matches COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: FRANCE in invoice. No discrepancies or ambiguities found. All confidence values ≥ 0.98.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-26D-463104 (utfärdat 2026-02-25) verifierat mot faktura 509192 (daterad 2026-02-17) från Th. Brunius & Co AB.

sections.certificate_value: Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Th. Brunius & Co AB, VAT NO: SE556011055201, Po Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) — consignor-namn identifierat i fakturans utställaradress, sidhuvud och signeringsblock. Landverifiering via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' återfinns som fakturautställare 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' — enda skillnad är ett mellanslag efter 'Th.' vilket är tillåten normalisering. Adress PO Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg matchar. Land Sverige bekräftat både via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd, Unit B,24/F,C and D International Building, No.1699,Huandao East Road, Siming District, Xiamen, China
sections.invoice_value: Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd, Unit B, 24/F, C&D International Building., No.1699, Huandao East Road, Siming District Xiamen, China
sections.rule_applied: Prioritetsordning (4.2.0.2) — SOLD TO är primärt faktureringsfält. Namnverifiering (4.2.2) med normalisering av '&' ↔ 'and'. Landkontroll (4.2.3).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Xiamen New Paper Source E-Commerce Co., Ltd' matchar exakt fakturans SOLD TO-fält. Adressvariationer ('C and D' vs 'C&D', komma/punkt) är tillåtna normaliseringar. Land Kina matchar explicit.

sections.invoice_value: Saica Testliner 90gsm; Total Unit Count: 27 Reels
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' identifierad exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Saica Testliner 90gsm' återfinns exakt i fakturans DESCRIPTION-fält. Även kvantiteten 27 reels bekräftas av fakturans 'Total Unit Count: 27 Reels'. Inga artikelnummer anges i certifikatet.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) — numeriskt värde 49.770 och enhet MT identifierade exakt i fakturan. Viktkategori (4.4.2.2) — certifikatet anger gross/net (samma värde), fakturan anger en totalvikt utan kategoriuppdelning.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger '49.770 mt gross/net'. Fakturan anger 'Total Weight Quantity: 49.770 MT'. Numeriskt värde 49.770 matchar exakt. Enhet MT matchar exakt. Certifikatet anger att brutto- och nettovikt är samma (gross/net). Fakturan anger en enda totalvikt utan GW/NW-uppdelning — inget motstridigt alternativt viktvärde finns. Per regel 4.4.2.2 punkt 2: MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Landnormalisering (4.5.4) — versaler/gemener. Identifiering i explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN-fält (4.5.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger 'France'. Fakturan har explicit fält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: FRANCE'. Efter normalisering av versaler/gemener: france = france. Exakt matchning.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) verifierade som MATCH med hög konfidens. Certifikat SEG-26D-463104 kan verifieras mot faktura 509192. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH → comparison_result IDENTICAL → workflow AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All confidence values ≥ 0.98, above 0.85 threshold. No inconsistencies detected.
